examples.en: I've had a crush on him since high school.
examples.zh: 我從高中就一直暗戀他。

examples.en: She has a huge crush on the new guy.
examples.zh: 她超級迷戀那個新來的人。

img: person blushing looking at secret admirer heart

examples.en: We're going on a date this Friday.
examples.zh: 我們這週五要去約會。

examples.en: He's my date for the wedding.
examples.zh: 他是我參加婚禮的約會對象。

img: couple at candlelit dinner restaurant table

examples.en: They make such a cute couple.
examples.zh: 他們真是很可愛的一對。

examples.en: The couple has been together for years.
examples.zh: 這對情侶已經在一起好幾年了。

img: two people holding hands walking together park

examples.en: Her boyfriend picked her up after work.
examples.zh: 她男朋友下班後來接她。

examples.en: Is he your boyfriend or just a friend?
examples.zh: 他是你男朋友還是只是朋友?

img: young man giving flowers to girlfriend

examples.en: He introduced his girlfriend to his parents.
examples.zh: 他把女朋友介紹給父母。

examples.en: My girlfriend loves this restaurant.
examples.zh: 我女朋友很愛這家餐廳。

img: smiling woman on date with partner

examples.en: I love you more than anything.
examples.zh: 我愛你勝過一切。

examples.en: They fell in love last summer.
examples.zh: 他們去年夏天墜入愛河。

img: couple embracing with heart shapes around them

examples.en: He kissed her on the cheek.
examples.zh: 他親了她的臉頰。

examples.en: They kissed under the stars.
examples.zh: 他們在星空下接吻。

img: couple kissing under moonlight

examples.en: She hugged him tightly at the airport.
examples.zh: 她在機場緊緊抱住他。

examples.en: Give me a hug before you go.
examples.zh: 走之前給我一個擁抱。

img: two people warmly hugging embrace

examples.en: I've been single for two years now.
examples.zh: 我單身兩年了。

examples.en: She's happily single and loving it.
examples.zh: 她開心地單身,樂在其中。

img: confident person alone enjoying coffee solo

examples.en: Will you marry me?
examples.zh: 你願意嫁給我嗎?

examples.en: They got married last spring.
examples.zh: 他們去年春天結婚了。

img: bride and groom exchanging wedding rings

examples.en: Their wedding was beautiful.
examples.zh: 他們的婚禮很美。

examples.en: I'm invited to my cousin's wedding.
examples.zh: 我受邀參加表親的婚禮。

img: wedding ceremony with white flowers and altar

examples.en: My partner and I share everything.
examples.zh: 我和我的伴侶分享一切。

examples.en: She brought her partner to the party.
examples.zh: 她帶伴侶來參加派對。

img: two partners cooking together in kitchen

examples.en: He was flirting with her all night.
examples.zh: 他整晚都在跟她調情。

examples.en: She flirted with the bartender for fun.
examples.zh: 她為了好玩跟酒保調情。

img: two people flirting playfully at a bar

examples.en: He finally confessed his feelings to her.
examples.zh: 他終於向她告白了。

examples.en: I want to confess before it's too late.
examples.zh: 我想在太遲之前告白。

img: nervous person confessing love holding letter

examples.en: Their romance began at a coffee shop.
examples.zh: 他們的戀情始於一家咖啡店。

examples.en: There's no romance left in our relationship.
examples.zh: 我們的關係已經沒有浪漫了。

img: romantic couple with rose petals candles

examples.en: The breakup left her heartbroken.
examples.zh: 這次分手讓她心碎。

examples.en: Their breakup shocked all their friends.
examples.zh: 他們分手讓所有朋友都很震驚。

img: couple sitting apart on bench sad

examples.en: She dumped him over a text message.
examples.zh: 她用簡訊把他甩了。

examples.en: I can't believe he dumped her.
examples.zh: 我不敢相信他甩了她。

img: person walking away leaving partner behind

examples.en: They got engaged on the beach.
examples.zh: 他們在海灘上訂婚了。

examples.en: She's engaged to her college sweetheart.
examples.zh: 她和大學時的戀人訂婚了。

img: hand showing engagement ring proposal beach

examples.en: He proposed to her at sunset.
examples.zh: 他在日落時向她求婚。

examples.en: She said yes when he proposed.
examples.zh: 他求婚時她答應了。

img: man kneeling proposing with ring box

examples.en: They have a healthy relationship.
examples.zh: 他們有段健康的感情關係。

examples.en: Our relationship is getting serious.
examples.zh: 我們的關係越來越認真了。

img: couple talking closely emotional connection

examples.en: He cheated on her with a coworker.
examples.zh: 他和同事劈腿背叛她。

examples.en: Cheating ruined their marriage.
examples.zh: 劈腿毀了他們的婚姻。

img: person secretly texting hiding phone from partner

examples.en: He gets jealous when she talks to others.
examples.zh: 她和別人講話時他會吃醋。

examples.en: Don't be jealous, he's just a friend.
examples.zh: 別吃醋,他只是朋友。

img: person frowning watching partner with someone else

examples.en: He's afraid of commitment.
examples.zh: 他害怕做出承諾。

examples.en: Marriage is a lifelong commitment.
examples.zh: 婚姻是一輩子的承諾。

img: two hands with matching promise rings

examples.en: She discovered his secret affair.
examples.zh: 她發現了他的秘密外遇。

examples.en: The affair destroyed their family.
examples.zh: 這段外遇毀了他們的家庭。

img: shadowy figure of hidden secret lover

examples.en: He planned a romantic getaway.
examples.zh: 他安排了一場浪漫的度假。

examples.en: That was such a romantic gesture.
examples.zh: 那真是個浪漫的舉動。

img: romantic candlelit dinner with roses

examples.en: They were high school sweethearts.
examples.zh: 他們是高中時的戀人。

examples.en: Good night, sweetheart.
examples.zh: 晚安,親愛的。

img: young couple with heart lockets smiling

examples.en: There was instant chemistry between them.
examples.zh: 他們之間立刻就來電了。

examples.en: We had great chemistry on our first date.
examples.zh: 我們第一次約會就很來電。

img: two people locking eyes sparks connection

examples.en: She showed her affection with small gifts.
examples.zh: 她用小禮物表達愛意。

examples.en: He's not good at showing affection.
examples.zh: 他不太擅長表達情感。

img: couple cuddling tenderly on sofa

examples.en: He has always been loyal to her.
examples.zh: 他一直對她很忠誠。

examples.en: Loyalty matters most in a relationship.
examples.zh: 在感情裡忠誠最重要。

img: couple holding hands promise faithful

examples.en: They reunited after years apart.
examples.zh: 他們分開多年後重逢。

examples.en: The couple reunited at the airport.
examples.zh: 這對情侶在機場重逢。

img: couple running to hug at airport reunion

examples.en: I ran into my ex at the party.
examples.zh: 我在派對上遇到我的前任。

examples.en: She's still friends with her ex.
examples.zh: 她跟前任還是朋友。

img: person seeing former partner awkward glance

examples.en: His infatuation faded after a month.
examples.zh: 他的痴迷一個月後就退了。

examples.en: It was just infatuation, not real love.
examples.zh: 那只是迷戀,不是真愛。

img: person daydreaming obsessed with photo of crush

examples.en: Their relationship is still ambiguous.
examples.zh: 他們的關係還很曖昧不明。

examples.en: He gave me an ambiguous answer.
examples.zh: 他給了我一個曖昧的回答。

img: two people close but uncertain unclear relationship

examples.en: They reconciled after a big fight.
examples.zh: 他們大吵一架後和好了。

examples.en: It took months to reconcile their differences.
examples.zh: 他們花了幾個月才化解分歧。

img: couple making peace holding hands apology

examples.en: Infidelity broke their trust forever.
examples.zh: 不忠永遠毀了他們的信任。

examples.en: She could not forgive his infidelity.
examples.zh: 她無法原諒他的不忠。

img: broken heart symbol shattered trust betrayal

examples.en: Their courtship lasted only three months.
examples.zh: 他們的追求期只有三個月。

examples.en: Courtship customs vary across cultures.
examples.zh: 求愛的習俗因文化而異。

img: old fashioned suitor courting with flowers

examples.en: They're surprisingly compatible.
examples.zh: 他們出奇地合得來。

examples.en: We're just not compatible as a couple.
examples.zh: 我們就是不適合當情侶。

img: two puzzle pieces fitting together perfectly

examples.en: He's estranged from his wife.
examples.zh: 他和妻子已經疏遠了。

examples.en: The estranged couple rarely speaks.
examples.zh: 這對疏遠的夫妻很少說話。

img: couple sitting far apart cold distance

examples.en: He was smitten from the first date.
examples.zh: 他第一次約會就被迷住了。

examples.en: She's completely smitten with him.
examples.zh: 她完全為他傾心。

img: person with hearts in eyes utterly charmed

examples.en: They planned a secret rendezvous.
examples.zh: 他們計劃了一場秘密幽會。

examples.en: The café was their usual rendezvous.
examples.zh: 那家咖啡廳是他們常約的地點。

img: couple meeting secretly at hidden cafe corner

examples.en: They shared an intimate moment.
examples.zh: 他們分享了一個親密的時刻。

examples.en: It was an intimate candlelit dinner.
examples.zh: 那是一頓親密的燭光晚餐。

img: couple whispering close intimate closeness

examples.en: He's a devoted husband and father.
examples.zh: 他是個深情的丈夫和父親。

examples.en: She's devoted to her partner.
examples.zh: 她全心全意對待伴侶。

img: loving partner caring devotedly for other

examples.en: He was the heartthrob of the school.
examples.zh: 他是全校的萬人迷。

examples.en: That actor is a teen heartthrob.
examples.zh: 那位演員是青少年的心動對象。

img: charming attractive person surrounded by admirers

examples.en: She didn't reciprocate his feelings.
examples.zh: 她沒有回應他的感情。

examples.en: He hoped she would reciprocate his love.
examples.zh: 他希望她能回應他的愛。

img: one person offering heart other returning it

examples.en: Their estrangement lasted for years.
examples.zh: 他們的疏遠持續了好幾年。

examples.en: The estrangement began after the argument.
examples.zh: 這段隔閡在那場爭吵後開始。

img: widening gap between two lonely figures

examples.en: He tried to woo her with poetry.
examples.zh: 他試著用詩來追求她。

examples.en: She was wooed by his charm.
examples.zh: 她被他的魅力打動。

img: suitor serenading with guitar under window

examples.en: They both believe in monogamy.
examples.zh: 他們都相信專一的關係。

examples.en: Monogamy requires trust and effort.
examples.zh: 專一需要信任和努力。

img: two rings intertwined symbol of exclusivity

examples.en: They decided to elope to Las Vegas.
examples.zh: 他們決定私奔去拉斯維加斯結婚。

examples.en: The couple eloped without telling anyone.
examples.zh: 這對情侶沒告訴任何人就私奔了。

img: couple running away together suitcase secret marriage

examples.en: Girls swoon over his gentle smile.
examples.zh: 女孩們為他溫柔的微笑神魂顛倒。

examples.en: She swooned when he held her hand.
examples.zh: 他牽她手時她心花怒放。

img: person swooning dreamily hand on chest
